name: claude-code-debug
description: Troubleshoot Claude Code extensions and behavior. Triggers on: debug, troubleshoot, not working, skill not loading, hook not running, agent not found.
capabilities: Diagnose skill activation and loading issues
author: 0xDarkMatter
securitySummary: This skill is a pure documentation resource containing troubleshooting guides, diagnostic command references, and decision trees for Claude Code. All 219 static findings are FALSE POSITIVES - they represent bash command examples in markdown documentation, not executable code. The skill contains no JavaScript/TypeScript code, makes no network calls, and performs no file system operations beyond reading its own markdown files. The allowed-tools field explicitly limits the skill to Bash and Read tools for helping users run diagnostic commands.
valueStatement: Claude Code extensions, hooks, and agents sometimes stop working. This skill provides step-by-step troubleshooting guides and diagnostic commands to identify and fix common problems quickly. Use it when skills fail to load, hooks do not execute, or agents are not being used.
limitations: Cannot execute commands directly on user system
Does not install or update Claude Code

useCases.title: Skill Not Loading
useCases.description: When a newly installed skill does not activate despite correct file structure and YAML frontmatter

useCases.title: Hook Not Executing
useCases.description: When hooks configured in settings.json fail to run or do not block tools as expected

useCases.title: MCP Server Issues
useCases.description: When Model Context Protocol servers fail to connect or tools are not available

promptTemplates.title: Basic Debug Request
promptTemplates.prompt: My Claude Code skill is not activating. How do I troubleshoot this?

promptTemplates.title: Hook Problem
promptTemplates.prompt: My hook script is not executing when tools are used. What diagnostic steps should I follow?

promptTemplates.title: Agent Issue
promptTemplates.prompt: Claude Code is not using my custom agent. How do I verify it is configured correctly?

promptTemplates.title: MCP Debug
promptTemplates.prompt: My MCP server is not connecting. Walk me through the debugging flow to identify the issue.

bestPractices: Run 'claude --debug' to see detailed loading and permission information
Validate all JSON files with 'jq .' before saving
Test hook scripts manually before relying on them
antiPatterns: Skipping the YAML frontmatter validation step
Using relative paths in hook configurations without $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR
Assuming a skill activates without adding specific trigger keywords

faq.question: What tools does this skill use?
faq.answer: The skill uses Bash and Read tools to help you run diagnostic commands and view configuration files.

faq.question: What are the limits of this skill?
faq.answer: This skill provides guidance only. It cannot execute commands on your system or modify your configuration files.

faq.question: How does this integrate with Claude Code?
faq.answer: The skill activates when you describe debugging scenarios. It provides documented commands you run yourself.

faq.question: Is my data safe?
faq.answer: Yes. This skill only reads documentation and suggests commands. It never accesses your files or sends data anywhere.

faq.question: Why is my hook not running?
faq.answer: Common causes: script not executable (chmod +x), wrong tool name matcher (case-sensitive), invalid JSON in settings.json.

faq.question: How is this different from built-in debugging?
faq.answer: This skill provides comprehensive decision trees and examples beyond the basic /hooks and /agents commands.
